summary: First implementation testing complete. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All screens and flows working correctly. Turkish word validation, scoring, achievements, and leaderboards functioning as specified.

issues: Console warnings about deprecated shadow* and textShadow* props (React Native Web deprecation, cosmetic only, not affecting functionality)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with prefix 'tu_', 'tr_', 'tp_', 'ts_', 'tt_', 'ta_', 'tlb_', 'test{timestamp}'. All test data includes timestamp to ensure uniqueness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs validated with comprehensive pytest suite. Frontend tested with Playwright on mobile viewport (375x667). Turkish word validation working correctly (48k+ words loaded from turkish_words.txt). Game mechanics: 15s timer, +3s per correct word, combo system, score calculation (10 + len*5) * combo all verified. Achievements and title progression working. Leaderboards (weekly/monthly) sorting correctly.

auth.login_creates_user: ✅ Creates new user with username, returns Çaylak title
auth.login_returns_existing: ✅ Returns same user on repeat login

user_profile.get_user: ✅ Returns user profile with all fields

game_flow.validate_valid: ✅ Accepts valid Turkish word with correct starting letter
game_flow.validate_wrong_letter: ✅ Rejects word not starting with required letter (e.g., 'elma' after 'masa' which needs 'a')
game_flow.validate_duplicate: ✅ Rejects duplicate word in same session
game_flow.submit_updates_stats: ✅ Updates best_score, total_score, games_played, words_total, max_combo
game_flow.submit_assigns_title: ✅ Assigns correct title based on score (Çaylak, Heveskar, Kelime Avcısı, etc.)

leaderboard.weekly: ✅ Returns weekly rankings sorted by score
leaderboard.monthly: ✅ Returns monthly rankings sorted by score

login_screen.elements: ✅ Username input, submit button, branding, hint text all present
login_screen.submission: ✅ Login API call successful, navigates to home

home_screen.elements: ✅ Title badge (ÇAYLAK), username, BAŞLA button, stats, nav buttons all present
home_screen.stats: ✅ Shows EN İYİ, OYUN, MAX KOMBO correctly
home_screen.testIDs: ✅ home-screen, user-title-badge, giant-start-button, home-leaderboard-button, home-profile-button, home-logout-button

game_screen.elements: ✅ Timer bar, score, combo, previous word, next letter, word input, exit button all present
game_screen.testIDs: ✅ game-screen, game-score, game-combo, game-time-bar, game-prev-word, game-next-letter, game-word-input, game-exit-button, game-feedback

game_over_screen.elements: ✅ Final score, stats, new achievements, action buttons all present
game_over_screen.navigation: ✅ Home button, play again button, leaderboard button all working

leaderboard_screen.elements: ✅ Back button, tabs, leaderboard entries with medals (🥇🥈🥉)

profile_screen.elements: ✅ Avatar, username, title badge, stats, achievements (8), title ladder all present
profile_screen.title_progress: ✅ Shows 'Sonraki unvan: Heveskar' with progress bar
